title: Formatting a Resume
scenario: Write a prompt that will generate a properly formatted resume for a given job applicant. The resume should include the applicant's name, contact information, work experience, education, and skills. Assume a standard format.
constraints: Must use a standard resume format

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated resume meets the given constraints.
Check if the generated resume includes the necessary sections (name, contact info, work experience, education, skills) and is properly formatted.
Check if the generated resume has a professional tone.
